title: erysimum tenellum
intro: Erysimum tenellum, also known as prairie rocket or small wallflower, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve nausea, and soothe respiratory issues due to its expectorant and carminative properties. Erysimum tenellum has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and indigestion, offering benefits such as reducing inflammation, promoting healing, and alleviating symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Erysimum tenellum are often made by infusing its flowers in hot water to create a tea or by using it in a salve or poultice to treat skin conditions and wounds.
